concerns.text: Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned throughout code/ for reproducibility. Tasks T014-T019 (data acquisition and preprocessing) do not explicitly address seed pinning, while T025 only covers model training. Add seed pinning tasks for 01_data_acquisition.py and 02_preprocessing.py.

Constitution Principle VII requires effect sizes for all statistical claims. T042 covers effect sizes for regression, but T036-T039 (correlation analysis) only document p-values and q-values (T038), not effect sizes for correlation coefficients. Add task to document correlation effect sizes (e.g., r values with interpretation).
